Title: User logs in successfully
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid username and password in the login form.
2. Click the login button.
3. Verify that the user is redirected to the main menu.
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to the main menu.

Title: User logs in as Admin
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password and is allowed to log in as Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid username and password in the login form.
2. Click the login button.
3. Verify that the user is redirected to the admin dashboard.
Expected Result: User is logged in as Admin and redirected to the admin dashboard.

Title: Invalid login attempt
Preconditions: User enters invalid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid username and password in the login form.
2. Click the login button.
3. Verify that the login fails and an error message is displayed.
Expected Result: Login fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: User logs out successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Click the logout button.
2. Verify that the user is redirected to the login page.
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected to the login page.

Title: User navigates through the menu
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the menu from the login screen.
2. Click on the "My Profile" option.
3. Click on the "Modify Account" option.
4. Click on the "Donate Points" option.
Expected Result: User is navigated through the menu and reaches the respective screens.

Title: Create, modify, accept, remove, and assign points to an announcement
Preconditions: User is logged in and has permission to manage announcements.
Test Steps:
1. Create a new announcement.
2. Mark the announcement as modified.
3. Accept the announcement.
4. Remove the announcement.
5. Accept the announcement while marking it as in progress.
6. Remove the announcement from in progress.
7. Assign points to the announcement.
Expected Result: Announcement is created, modified, accepted, removed, marked as in progress, removed from in progress, and points are assigned.

Title: User creates a new user
Preconditions: User has permission to create new users.
Test Data:
- New username: new_user
- New password: new_password
Test Steps:
1. Create a new user.
2. Save the data in the database.
Expected Result: A new user is created and data is saved in the database.

Title: Create and save a notification
Preconditions: User is logged in and has permission to manage notifications.
Test Data:
- Notification title: "New Notification"
- Notification content: "This is a new notification."
Test Steps:
1. Create a new notification.
2. Display the notification on the notification board.
3. Save the notification in the database.
Expected Result: A new notification is created, displayed on the notification board, and saved in the database.

Title: User interacts with the database
Preconditions: User is logged in and has permission to interact with the database.
Test Steps:
1. Insert data into the database.
2. Retrieve data from the database.
Expected Result: Data is inserted and retrieved successfully from the database.

Title: User modifies their profile
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: - New profile information: updated_name, updated_email, updated_password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Modify the profile information.
3. Save the changes.
Expected Result: Profile information is updated and saved successfully.

Title: User donates points
Preconditions: User is logged in and has points to donate.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the donation page.
2. Select the number of points to donate.
3. Confirm the donation.
Expected Result: Points are donated successfully.
